```python
import pygame
import sys
import time

# ==================== 常量定义 ====================
SCREEN_WIDTH = 800
SCREEN_HEIGHT = 600
BLACK = (0, 0, 0)
WHITE = (255, 255, 255)
PADDLE_WIDTH = 15
PADDLE_HEIGHT = 100
BALL_SIZE = 20
PADDLE_SPEED = 7
AI_SPEED = 5
BALL_SPEED_INITIAL = 5
BALL_SPEED_INCREMENT = 0.5
MAX_BALL_SPEED = 12
TARGET_SCORE = 5
GAME_DURATION = 120

# 游戏方向常量
UP = -1
DOWN = 1

# ==================== 类定义 ====================

class Paddle:
    def __init__(self, x, y):
        self.rect = pygame.Rect(x, y, PADDLE_WIDTH, PADDLE_HEIGHT)
        self.speed = PADDLE_SPEED
        self.direction = 0  # -1: up, 0: stopped, 1: down

    def move_up(self):
        self.direction = UP

    def move_down(self):
        self.direction = DOWN

    def stop(self):
        self.direction = 0

    def update(self):
        if self.direction == UP:
            self.rect.y -= self.speed
        elif self.direction == DOWN:
            self.rect.y += self.speed

        # 边界检查
        if self.rect.top < 0:
            self.rect.top = 0
        if self.rect.bottom > SCREEN_HEIGHT:
            self.rect.bottom = SCREEN_HEIGHT

    def draw(self, screen):
        pygame.draw.rect(screen, WHITE, self.rect)

class Ball:
    def __init__(self):
        self.reset()

    def reset(self):
        self.rect = pygame.Rect(SCREEN_WIDTH // 2 - BALL_SIZE // 2,
                               SCREEN_HEIGHT // 2 - BALL_SIZE // 2,
                               BALL_SIZE, BALL_SIZE)
        # 随机选择发球方向
        direction_x = 1 if time.time() % 2 == 0 else -1
        self.speed_x = BALL_SPEED_INITIAL * direction_x
        self.speed_y = BALL_SPEED_INITIAL * (2 * (time.time() % 1) - 1)  # 约0左右的y方向
        # 确保y方向速度不为0
        if abs(self.speed_y) < 1:
            self.speed_y = BALL_SPEED_INITIAL * 0.8
        self.speed_multiplier = 1

    def update(self):
        # 更新位置
        self.rect.x += self.speed_x
        self.rect.y += self.speed_y

        # 上下边界反弹
        if self.rect.top <= 0 or self.rect.bottom >= SCREEN_HEIGHT:
            self.speed_y = -self.speed_y

    def increase_speed(self):
        self.speed_multiplier = min(self.speed_multiplier + BALL_SPEED_INCREMENT, MAX_BALL_SPEED)
        # 同时增加x和y方向的速度分量
        self.speed_x = self.speed_x / abs(self.speed_x) * self.speed_multiplier
        self.speed_y = self.speed_y / abs(self.speed_y) * self.speed_multiplier

    def draw(self, screen):
        pygame.draw.ellipse(screen, WHITE, self.rect)


class Game:
    def __init__(self):
        pygame.init()
        self.screen = pygame.display.set_mode((SCREEN_WIDTH, SCREEN_HEIGHT))
        pygame.display.set_caption("Pong Game")
        self.clock = pygame.time.Clock()
        self.font = pygame.font.Font(None, 74)
        self.small_font = pygame.font.Font(None, 36)

        # 初始化游戏对象
        self.player_paddle = Paddle(10, SCREEN_HEIGHT // 2 - PADDLE_HEIGHT // 2)
        self.ai_paddle = Paddle(SCREEN_WIDTH - 25, SCREEN_HEIGHT // 2 - PADDLE_HEIGHT // 2)
        self.ball = Ball()

        # 游戏状态
        self.player_score = 0
        self.ai_score = 0
        self.game_over = False
        self.start_time = time.time()
        self.game_over_message = ""

    def handle_events(self):
        for event in pygame.event.get():
            if event.type == pygame.QUIT:
                self.game_over = True
                return

        keys = pygame.key.get_pressed()
        if keys[pygame.K_UP]:
            self.player_paddle.move_up()
        elif keys[pygame.K_DOWN]:
            self.player_paddle.move_down()
        else:
            self.player_paddle.stop()

        # 玩家也可以用Esc退出游戏
        if keys[pygame.K_ESCAPE]:
            self.game_over = True

    def update_ai(self):
        # AI 逻辑：尝试让球拍中心对准球的中心
        paddle_center = self.ai_paddle.rect.centery
        ball_center = self.ball.rect.centery

        # 如果AI无法及时反应，增加一些随机误差
        if abs(paddle_center - ball_center) > 10:
            if paddle_center < ball_center:
                self.ai_paddle.rect.y += AI_SPEED
            else:
                self.ai_paddle.rect.y -= AI_SPEED

        # AI 边界检查
        if self.ai_paddle.rect.top < 0:
            self.ai_paddle.rect.top = 0
        if self.ai_paddle.rect.bottom > SCREEN_HEIGHT:
            self.ai_paddle.rect.bottom = SCREEN_HEIGHT

    def check_collisions(self):
        # 球拍与球碰撞检测
        if (self.ball.rect.colliderect(self.player_paddle.rect) or 
            self.ball.rect.colliderect(self.ai_paddle.rect)):
            self.ball.increase_speed()
            # 反转x方向
            self.ball.speed_x = -self.ball.speed_x

        # 边界得分检测
        if self.ball.rect.left <= 0:
            self.ai_score += 1
            self.ball.reset()
        elif self.ball.rect.right >= SCREEN_WIDTH:
            self.player_score += 1
            self.ball.reset()

    def check_win_condition(self):
        # 检查分数
        if self.player_score >= TARGET_SCORE:
            self.game_over = True
            self.game_over_message = "Player Wins!"
        elif self.ai_score >= TARGET_SCORE:
            self.game_over = True
            self.game_over_message = "AI Wins!"

        # 检查时间
        elapsed_time = int(time.time() - self.start_time)
        remaining_time = GAME_DURATION - elapsed_time
        if remaining_time <= 0:
            self.game_over = True
            if self.player_score > self.ai_score:
                self.game_over_message = "Time's up! Player Wins!"
            elif self.ai_score > self.player_score:
                self.game_over_message = "Time's up! AI Wins!"
            else:
                self.game_over_message = "Time's up! Draw!"

    def draw_score(self):
        score_text = self.font.render(str(self.player_score), True, WHITE)
        self.screen.blit(score_text, (SCREEN_WIDTH // 4, 10))

        score_text = self.font.render(str(self.ai_score), True, WHITE)
        self.screen.blit(score_text, (SCREEN_WIDTH * 3 // 4 - score_text.get_width(), 10))

    def draw_time(self):
        elapsed_time = int(time.time() - self.start_time)
        remaining_time = GAME_DURATION - elapsed_time
        if remaining_time < 0:
            remaining_time = 0
        time_text = self.small_font.render(f"Time: {remaining_time}s", True, WHITE)
        self.screen.blit(time_text, (10, SCREEN_HEIGHT - 40))

    def draw_game_over(self):
        self.screen.fill(BLACK)
        game_over_text = self.font.render(self.game_over_message, True, WHITE)
        text_rect = game_over_text.get_rect(center=(SCREEN_WIDTH // 2, SCREEN_HEIGHT // 2 - 50))
        self.screen.blit(game_over_text, text_rect)

        restart_text = self.small_font.render("Press SPACE to restart or Esc to exit", True, WHITE)
        restart_rect = restart_text.get_rect(center=(SCREEN_WIDTH // 2, SCREEN_HEIGHT // 2 + 50))
        self.screen.blit(restart_text, restart_rect)

        pygame.display.flip()

        # 等待玩家操作
        while True:
            for event in pygame.event.get():
                if event.type == pygame.QUIT:
                    pygame.quit()
                    sys.exit()
            keys = pygame.key.get_pressed()
            if keys[pygame.K_SPACE]:
                self.reset_game()
                return
            elif keys[pygame.K_ESCAPE]:
                self.game_over = True
                return
            self.clock.tick(60)

    def reset_game(self):
        self.player_score = 0
        self.ai_score = 0
        self.ball.reset()
        self.start_time = time.time()
        self.game_over = False
        self.game_over_message = ""

    def run(self):
        while not self.game_over:
            self.handle_events()
            if self.game_over:
                break

            self.player_paddle.update()
            self.update_ai()
            self.ball.update()
            self.check_collisions()
            self.check_win_condition()

            # 绘制
            self.screen.fill(BLACK)

            # 绘制球拍
            self.player_paddle.draw(self.screen)
            self.ai_paddle.draw(self.screen)

            # 绘制球
            self.ball.draw(self.screen)

            # 绘制中线
            pygame.draw.aaline(self.screen, WHITE, 
                             (SCREEN_WIDTH // 2, 0), 
                             (SCREEN_WIDTH // 2, SCREEN_HEIGHT))

            # 绘制分数
            self.draw_score()
            self.draw_time()

            pygame.display.flip()
            self.clock.tick(60)

        # 游戏结束处理
        while self.game_over:
            self.draw_game_over()

        pygame.quit()
        sys.exit()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    game = Game()
    game.run()
```

```python
import pygame
import sys
import time

# ==================== 常量定义 ====================
SCREEN_WIDTH = 800
SCREEN_HEIGHT = 600
BLACK = (0, 0, 0)
WHITE = (255, 255, 255)
PADDLE_WIDTH = 15
PADDLE_HEIGHT = 100
BALL_SIZE = 20
PADDLE_SPEED = 7
AI_SPEED = 5
BALL_SPEED_INITIAL = 5
BALL_SPEED_INCREMENT = 0.5
MAX_BALL_SPEED = 12
TARGET_SCORE = 5
GAME_DURATION = 120

# 游戏方向常量
UP = -1
DOWN = 1

# ==================== 类定义 ====================

class Paddle:
    def __init__(self, x, y):
        self.rect = pygame.Rect(x, y, PADDLE_WIDTH, PADDLE_HEIGHT)
        self.speed = PADDLE_SPEED
        self.direction = 0  # -1: up, 0: stopped, 1: down

    def move_up(self):
        self.direction = UP

    def move_down(self):
        self.direction = DOWN

    def stop(self):
        self.direction = 0

    def update(self):
        if self.direction == UP:
            self.rect.y -= self.speed
        elif self.direction == DOWN:
            self.rect.y += self.speed

        # 边界检查
        if self.rect.top < 0:
            self.rect.top = 0
        if self.rect.bottom > SCREEN_HEIGHT:
            self.rect.bottom = SCREEN_HEIGHT

    def draw(self, screen):
        pygame.draw.rect(screen, WHITE, self.rect)

class Ball:
    def __init__(self):
        self.reset()

    def reset(self):
        self.rect = pygame.Rect(SCREEN_WIDTH // 2 - BALL_SIZE // 2,
                               SCREEN_HEIGHT // 2 - BALL_SIZE // 2,
                               BALL_SIZE, BALL_SIZE)
        # 随机选择发球方向
        direction_x = 1 if time.time() % 2 == 0 else -1
        self.speed_x = BALL_SPEED_INITIAL * direction_x
        self.speed_y = BALL_SPEED_INITIAL * (2 * (time.time() % 1) - 1)  # 约0左右的y方向
        # 确保y方向速度不为0
        if abs(self.speed_y) < 1:
            self.speed_y = BALL_SPEED_INITIAL * 0.8
        self.speed_multiplier = 1

    def update(self):
        # 更新位置
        self.rect.x += self.speed_x
        self.rect.y += self.speed_y

        # 上下边界反弹
        if self.rect.top <= 0 or self.rect.bottom >= SCREEN_HEIGHT:
            self.speed_y = -self.speed_y

    def increase_speed(self):
        self.speed_multiplier = min(self.speed_multiplier + BALL_SPEED_INCREMENT, MAX_BALL_SPEED)
        # 同时增加x和y方向的速度分量
        self.speed_x = self.speed_x / abs(self.speed_x) * self.speed_multiplier
        self.speed_y = self.speed_y / abs(self.speed_y) * self.speed_multiplier

    def draw(self, screen):
        pygame.draw.ellipse(screen, WHITE, self.rect)


class Game:
    def __init__(self):
        pygame.init()
        self.screen = pygame.display.set_mode((SCREEN_WIDTH, SCREEN_HEIGHT))
        pygame.display.set_caption("Pong Game")
        self.clock = pygame.time.Clock()
        self.font = pygame.font.Font(None, 74)
        self.small_font = pygame.font.Font(None, 36)

        # 初始化游戏对象
        self.player_paddle = Paddle(10, SCREEN_HEIGHT // 2 - PADDLE_HEIGHT // 2)
        self.ai_paddle = Paddle(SCREEN_WIDTH - 25, SCREEN_HEIGHT // 2 - PADDLE_HEIGHT // 2)
        self.ball = Ball()

        # 游戏状态
        self.player_score = 0
        self.ai_score = 0
        self.game_over = False
        self.start_time = time.time()
        self.game_over_message = ""

    def handle_events(self):
        for event in pygame.event.get():
            if event.type == pygame.QUIT:
                self.game_over = True
                return

        keys = pygame.key.get_pressed()
        if keys[pygame.K_UP]:
            self.player_paddle.move_up()
        elif keys[pygame.K_DOWN]:
            self.player_paddle.move_down()
        else:
            self.player_paddle.stop()

        # 玩家也可以用Esc退出游戏
        if keys[pygame.K_ESCAPE]:
            self.game_over = True

    def update_ai(self):
        # AI 逻辑：尝试让球拍中心对准球的中心
        paddle_center = self.ai_paddle.rect.centery
        ball_center = self.ball.rect.centery

        # 如果AI无法及时反应，增加一些随机误差
        if abs(paddle_center - ball_center) > 10:
            if paddle_center < ball_center:
                self.ai_paddle.rect.y += AI_SPEED
            else:
                self.ai_paddle.rect.y -= AI_SPEED

        # AI 边界检查
        if self.ai_paddle.rect.top < 0:
            self.ai_paddle.rect.top = 0
        if self.ai_paddle.rect.bottom > SCREEN_HEIGHT:
            self.ai_paddle.rect.bottom = SCREEN_HEIGHT

    def check_collisions(self):
        # 球拍与球碰撞检测
        if (self.ball.rect.colliderect(self.player_paddle.rect) or 
            self.ball.rect.colliderect(self.ai_paddle.rect)):
            self.ball.increase_speed()
            # 反转x方向
            self.ball.speed_x = -self.ball.speed_x

        # 边界得分检测
        if self.ball.rect.left <= 0:
            self.ai_score += 1
            self.ball.reset()
        elif self.ball.rect.right >= SCREEN_WIDTH:
            self.player_score += 1
            self.ball.reset()

    def check_win_condition(self):
        # 检查分数
        if self.player_score >= TARGET_SCORE:
            self.game_over = True
            self.game_over_message = "Player Wins!"
        elif self.ai_score >= TARGET_SCORE:
            self.game_over = True
            self.game_over_message = "AI Wins!"

        # 检查时间
        elapsed_time = int(time.time() - self.start_time)
        remaining_time = GAME_DURATION - elapsed_time
        if remaining_time <= 0:
            self.game_over = True
            if self.player_score > self.ai_score:
                self.game_over_message = "Time's up! Player Wins!"
            elif self.ai_score > self.player_score:
                self.game_over_message = "Time's up! AI Wins!"
            else:
                self.game_over_message = "Time's up! Draw!"

    def draw_score(self):
        score_text = self.font.render(str(self.player_score), True, WHITE)
        self.screen.blit(score_text, (SCREEN_WIDTH // 4, 10))

        score_text = self.font.render(str(self.ai_score), True, WHITE)
        self.screen.blit(score_text, (SCREEN_WIDTH * 3 // 4 - score_text.get_width(), 10))

    def draw_time(self):
        elapsed_time = int(time.time() - self.start_time)
        remaining_time = GAME_DURATION - elapsed_time
        if remaining_time < 0:
            remaining_time = 0
        time_text = self.small_font.render(f"Time: {remaining_time}s", True, WHITE)
        self.screen.blit(time_text, (10, SCREEN_HEIGHT - 40))

    def draw_game_over(self):
        self.screen.fill(BLACK)
        game_over_text = self.font.render(self.game_over_message, True, WHITE)
        text_rect = game_over_text.get_rect(center=(SCREEN_WIDTH // 2, SCREEN_HEIGHT // 2 - 50))
        self.screen.blit(game_over_text, text_rect)

        restart_text = self.small_font.render("Press SPACE to restart or Esc to exit", True, WHITE)
        restart_rect = restart_text.get_rect(center=(SCREEN_WIDTH // 2, SCREEN_HEIGHT // 2 + 50))
        self.screen.blit(restart_text, restart_rect)

        pygame.display.flip()

        # 等待玩家操作
        while True:
            for event in pygame.event.get():
                if event.type == pygame.QUIT:
                    pygame.quit()
                    sys.exit()
            keys = pygame.key.get_pressed()
            if keys[pygame.K_SPACE]:
                self.reset_game()
                return
            elif keys[pygame.K_ESCAPE]:
                self.game_over = True
                return
            self.clock.tick(60)

    def reset_game(self):
        self.player_score = 0
        self.ai_score = 0
        self.ball.reset()
        self.start_time = time.time()
        self.game_over = False
        self.game_over_message = ""

    def run(self):
        while not self.game_over:
            self.handle_events()
            if self.game_over:
                break

            self.player_paddle.update()
            self.update_ai()
            self.ball.update()
            self.check_collisions()
            self.check_win_condition()

            # 绘制
            self.screen.fill(BLACK)

            # 绘制球拍
            self.player_paddle.draw(self.screen)
            self.ai_paddle.draw(self.screen)

            # 绘制球
            self.ball.draw(self.screen)

            # 绘制中线
            pygame.draw.aaline(self.screen, WHITE, 
                             (SCREEN_WIDTH // 2, 0), 
                             (SCREEN_WIDTH // 2, SCREEN_HEIGHT))

            # 绘制分数
            self.draw_score()
            self.draw_time()

            pygame.display.flip()
            self.clock.tick(60)

        # 游戏结束处理
        while self.game_over:
            self.draw_game_over()

        pygame.quit()
        sys.exit()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    game = Game()
    game.run()
